tools.name: list_services
tools.title: List Puretech Enterprises services
tools.description: Return the full catalog of business services offered by Puretech Enterprises, grouped by category (business registration, tax, NAPSA/NHIMA, tenders, financial consultancy, printing & branding, stationery, ICT).

tools.name: get_service
tools.title: Get service details
tools.description: Get details for a single Puretech Enterprises service category by its slug (e.g. 'business-registration', 'tax-zra', 'ict-services').

tools.name: get_contact_info
tools.title: Get Puretech Enterprises contact info
tools.description: Return official public contact details for Puretech Enterprises: phone, WhatsApp, email, location, and prebuilt WhatsApp/tel links.

tools.name: get_faqs
tools.title: Get frequently asked questions
tools.description: Return the list of public FAQs answered on the Puretech Enterprises website.

tools.name: build_whatsapp_enquiry_link
tools.title: Build WhatsApp enquiry link
tools.description: Create a WhatsApp deep link that opens a chat with Puretech Enterprises pre-filled with an enquiry about the given service.

service.description: Service the user is enquiring about, e.g. 'Company Registration'.
